# Contract: Power Automate Lead Processing Trigger

**Flow**: Lead Processing Pipeline (Flow #1)
**Trigger**: When an HTTP request is received
**Method**: POST

## Request

**URL**: `<auto-generated by Power Automate after saving>`
**Content-Type**: `application/json`

```json
{
  "name": "Jane Smith",
  "company": "Acme Industries",
  "email": "jane@acme-industries.com",
  "message": "We need pricing for warehouse automation solutions. Timeline is Q3 this year."
}
```

| Field | Type | Required | Validation |
|-------|------|----------|------------|
| name | string | Yes | Not empty |
| company | string | Yes | Not empty |
| email | string | Yes | Valid email format |
| message | string | Yes | Not empty, max 2000 chars |

## Response

### Success (200)
```json
{
  "status": "processed",
  "id": 42
}
```

### Error (500)
```json
{
  "status": "error",
  "message": "Pipeline failed at scope: Create SharePoint Record"
}
```

## CORS
Power Automate HTTP triggers accept cross-origin requests by default. No additional CORS configuration needed for browser-based form submissions.
